name: Pasta and Crab Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cooked and chilled pasta with crab meat.
2. Add mayonnaise, garlic, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Dice the onion and mix it into the salad.
4. If using optional ingredients, add broccoli florets, peas, cauliflower florets, carrots, and celery.
5. Mix all the ingredients thoroughly until well combined.
6. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld and chill the dish thoroughly.
